# North Fin Services

> Professional online tax filing services for individuals and businesses across Canada.

## About

North Fin Services is a Canada-wide online tax filing service. We help individuals, international students, newcomers, self-employed professionals, freelancers, and small business owners file their Canadian taxes accurately and maximize their refunds. We operate 100% online and serve clients in every province and territory.

## Services

- **Personal Tax Filing (T1):** Complete individual income tax return preparation and e-filing with the CRA. For employees, students, newcomers, retirees, and all Canadian residents. Includes T4, T5, T2202, RRSP, capital gains, rental income, and all standard credits and deductions.
- **GST/HST Return Filing:** Accurate GST/HST return preparation for self-employed individuals, freelancers, and small businesses. Includes input tax credit (ITC) optimization, filing for all reporting periods, and compliance guidance.
- **Tax Planning & Advisory:** Proactive tax strategies including RRSP and TFSA optimization, income splitting, business structuring and incorporation advice, capital gains planning, and year-end tax reviews.

## Key Features

- Maximum Refund Guarantee
- 24-48 Hour Turnaround on most returns
- Multilingual service: English, Hindi, and Punjabi
- 100% online - no in-person visit required
- Serving all of Canada
- Free initial consultation
- Secure, encrypted document handling

## Important Canadian Tax Deadlines

- February 28: Employers must issue T4 slips
- March 1: RRSP contribution deadline for previous tax year
- April 30: Filing deadline for most Canadians and payment due date
- June 15: Filing deadline for self-employed (balance owing still due April 30)
